title: delphinium montanum f. calvescens
intro: Delphinium montanum f. calvescens, also known as the alpine delphinium, is a variety of the Delphinium montanum plant, which is a perennial flowering plant in the buttercup family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Delphinium montanum f. calvescens include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, due to its high concentration of alkaloids and flavonoids. Delphinium montanum f. calvescens can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the dried flowers or leaves in hot water, and it has also been used in traditional remedies for various ailments.
